ai_summary: Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL) announced its 28th Annual General Meeting and a significant change to its Governing Board. Smt. Geetha Gangadharan, BSE's Chief Regulatory Officer and former SEBI Chief General Manager, has been appointed as a Non-Independent Director, pending shareholder and SEBI approval, bringing extensive regulatory expertise to the board. This appointment is expected to enhance CDSL's governance and compliance oversight, with no red flags identified in this routine corporate announcement.
